meta.description: Base humanoid body: 22 layers, 5 standard animations. Override color-palette and face/hair/accessory layers in concrete spec.

frame.layer-offsets: pelvis:0,-1; torso:0,-1; neck:0,-1; head:0,-1; face:0,-1; hair_back:0,-1; hair_front:0,-1; accessory:0,-1; upper_arm_left:0,-1; upper_arm_right:0,-1; forearm_left:0,-1; forearm_right:0,-1; hand_left:0,-1; hand_right:0,-1
